# flashblade_quota_user (Data Source)

Reads an existing per-filesystem user quota from a FlashBlade array.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_quota_user" "example" {
  file_system_name = "my-filesystem"
  uid              = "1001"
}

output "user_quota_usage" {
  value = data.flashblade_quota_user.example.usage
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file_system_name` (String) Name of the file system the quota is attached to.
- `uid` (String) User ID (UID) the quota applies to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic composite identifier in the form file_system_name/uid.
- `quota` (Number) Quota limit in bytes.
- `usage` (Number) Current usage in bytes.
